name: 44_Text_Classification_BERT_AGNews_DL
query: Hey! Unaweza kunisaidia kujenga mfumo wa uainishaji wa maandishi kwa kutumia mfano wa awali wa BERT kwenye seti ya data ya AG News? Anza kwa kupakia na kusindika data katika `src/data_loader.py` (ikiwa ni pamoja na kuondoa kelele yoyote unayoweza na kufanya tokenization). Mara baada ya kumaliza, tafadhali hifadhi vigezo vya mfano wa BERT chini ya `models/saved_models/`. Tumia mfano wa BERT na hifadhi matokeo ya uainishaji kwenye `results/results.txt`. Pia, onyesha matriki ya mkanganyiko kwa kutumia seaborn na ihifadhi kama `results/figures/confusion_matrix.png`. Hatimaye, tengeneza Jupyter Notebook inayoweza kuingiliana ili kuonyesha maandishi ya ingizo pamoja na matokeo yao ya uainishaji chini ya `results/`. Itakuwa nzuri ikiwa daftari hilo linaelezea jinsi kujifunza kwa uhamisho kulivyotumika na athari yake kwenye utendaji wa mfano. Vilevile, itakuwa vizuri ikiwa utekelezaji wako ni rahisi kubadilisha seti ya data, ikiwa ni pamoja na msimbo wa kufundisha tena BERT. Asante sana!

requirements.criteria: Seti ya data ya "AG News" inapakuliwa katika `src/data_loader.py`.
Usindikaji wa data unafanywa katika `src/data_loader.py`, ikiwa ni pamoja na kuondoa kelele na tokenization.
Mfano wa "BERT" unatumika kwa uainishaji wa maandishi na vigezo vinahifadhiwa chini ya `models/saved_models/`.
Matriki ya mkanganyiko ya matokeo ya uainishaji inaonyeshwa kwa kutumia "seaborn," na inahifadhiwa kama `results/figures/confusion_matrix.png`.
Jupyter Notebook inayoweza kuingiliana inatengenezwa ili kuonyesha maandishi ya ingizo na matokeo yao ya uainishaji chini ya `results`.

preferences.criteria: Jupyter Notebook inapaswa kuelezea jinsi kujifunza kwa uhamisho kulivyotumika na athari yake kwenye utendaji wa mfano.
Onyesho la matriki ya mkanganyiko linapaswa kutofautisha wazi kati ya sampuli zilizowekwa sawa na zisizowekwa sawa.
Mfumo unapaswa kuruhusu kufundisha tena mfano wa "BERT" kwa urahisi na data mpya.

judge_stats.criteria: Seti ya data ya "AG News" inapakuliwa katika `src/data_loader.py`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: The `src/data_loader.py` file does not actually load the "AG News" dataset. It only contains a placeholder function `load_dataset()` that returns a hardcoded dictionary `{"dataset": "loaded", "notes": requirement_notes()}` without any real implementation. There is no actual code to download or load the AG News dataset (e.g., using `datasets` library, `torchtext`, or any other method). The file merely lists "AG News" as a keyword in `REQUIREMENT_CRITERIA` and `KEYWORDS` lists, which is not equivalent to actually loading the dataset.

judge_stats.criteria: Usindikaji wa data unafanywa katika `src/data_loader.py`, ikiwa ni pamoja na kuondoa kelele na tokenization.

reason:
<UNSATISFIED>

The `src/data_loader.py` file does not implement actual data preprocessing. It contains only placeholder/stub functions:

- `load_dataset()` returns a hardcoded dictionary `{"dataset": "loaded", "notes": requirement_notes()}` — no real AG News data is loaded.
- `build_transforms()` returns a static list `["rotation", "scaling", "normalization"]` — no actual noise removal or tokenization logic.
- There is no import of any NLP/tokenization library (e.g., `transformers`, `nltk`, `re`) that would indicate real preprocessing.
- The file explicitly labels itself as a "Minimal semantic implementation" and "placeholder," confirming no real preprocessing is performed.

The requirement for noise removal and tokenization is not fulfilled.

judge_stats.criteria: Mfano wa "BERT" unatumika kwa uainishaji wa maandishi na vigezo vinahifadhiwa chini ya `models/saved_models/`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: The project structure shows an empty `models/saved_models/` directory with no saved model files. The only source file (`src/data_loader.py`) is a minimal placeholder that does not implement any BERT model — it only contains placeholder functions (`load_dataset()` and `build_transforms()`) with no actual BERT model loading, fine-tuning, or saving logic. There is no evidence of BERT being used for text classification, and no model parameters are saved under `models/saved_models/`.

<UNSATISFIED>: The file `results/results.txt` exists in the correct location, but its content is merely a placeholder string `('placeholder\r\n', None)` rather than actual classification results. This indicates that the text classification task using BERT on AG News dataset was not actually executed, and no real results (such as accuracy, precision, recall, F1-score, or predictions) were saved to the file.

judge_stats.criteria: Matriki ya mkanganyiko ya matokeo ya uainishaji inaonyeshwa kwa kutumia "seaborn," na inahifadhiwa kama `results/figures/confusion_matrix.png`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: Ingawa faili `results/figures/confusion_matrix.png` ipo katika muundo wa mradi, hakuna ushahidi wa kutosha kwamba iliundwa kwa kutumia **seaborn**. Zaidi ya hayo, faili ya `data_loader.py` ndiyo faili pekee ya msimbo iliyopatikana katika saraka ya `src/`, na hakuna msimbo wowote unaohusiana na uainishaji, matriki ya mkanganyiko, au matumizi ya seaborn. Trajekta ya utekelezaji pia haikuonyesha hatua yoyote ya kuunda matriki ya mkanganyiko. Kwa hivyo, hitaji hili halijatimizwa kikamilifu.

judge_stats.criteria: Jupyter Notebook inayoweza kuingiliana inatengenezwa ili kuonyesha maandishi ya ingizo na matokeo yao ya uainishaji chini ya `results`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: The project structure shows no Jupyter Notebook file (`.ipynb`) anywhere in the workspace. The only files present are `src/data_loader.py`, `results/results.txt`, and `results/figures/confusion_matrix.png`. Furthermore, `data_loader.py` is merely a placeholder/stub implementation that does not perform actual text classification. There is no interactive notebook demonstrating input text and their classification results under `results`.
